hooks.command: input=$(cat); path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); case "$path" in *README.md) ;; *.md) jq -n --rawfile ctx /Users/victorboscaro/house_project/.claude/skills/custom/frontmatter.md '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",additionalContext:$ctx}}' ;; esac
